summary: Iteration 6 testing of SCSS AB ADVOCATE Email Converter fixes: body truncation ([:8000]), separate email save per send, BODY|JSON tab switcher. All 8 backend tests passed. All UI flows verified via Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: ABWORKS.mbox emails have <NO SUBJECT> and <UNKNOWN> sender — this is a parsing/extraction issue from the mbox file itself, not a code bug. The structured JSON and BODY/JSON tabs display correctly regardless.
chat.py line 55: body sliced at [:8000] — confirmed correct (was [:1000] previously)
seed_data_creation: Test emails created during testing then cleaned up. Some email refs remain in DB from manual send testing (4 refs total after tests).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 fixes verified: (1) body uses [:8000] in chat.py — confirmed in code and backend; (2) onSendToAdvocate in App.js calls POST /api/emails once per email with structured body + attachments_summary — verified 2 separate emails saved on bulk send; (3) DetailTabs component shows BODY|JSON tabs in job detail view — confirmed working with attachment_count and attachments[] in JSON. WIPE_DB button visible in EC jobs table. Policy Docs tab visible in EmailPanel. App at https://neon-advocate.preview.emergentagent.com, gate: BENJI.

verified_features.body_json_tabs_in_detail_view: PASS — both BODY and JSON tabs render correctly
verified_features.json_tab_shows_attachment_count_and_arra: PASS — attachment_count, attachments[], has_attachments all present
verified_features.email_ref_body_not_truncated: PASS — body length 11474 chars, structured format with Subject/From/To header
verified_features.wipe_db_button_visible: PASS — visible in EC jobs table
